---
title: "Home"
site: workflowr::wflow_site
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: false
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

**Analyses:**

+ [Try susie-love with various lambda](lambda_various_values_susie_love.html)

+ [Learn lambda and nu0 in special settings](special-settings-prior-learn.html)
